summary: The diff implements a comprehensive static portfolio website for Mudit Sharma / Khudrang Kalakaar. All major requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-9) appear to be substantially implemented: hero section, about section, services, why choose us, 5 featured projects, contact section, sticky navigation with hamburger menu, Poppins font, terracotta accent colors, and image references from the correct asset path. A few minor gaps and hallucinated features are noted.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-8: Active section is visually indicated in the nav — the 'Why Us' nav link maps to section id 'why-us', but the WhyChooseSection component content is not shown in the diff to confirm it uses id='why-us'.
missing_requirements.reason: Navigation uses href='why-us' but the WhyChooseSection file content is not visible in the diff. If the section id does not match, smooth-scroll and active highlighting would break for that link.

hallucinated_features.description: InternetIdentity authentication provider, useInternetIdentity hook, useActor hook, and QueryClientProvider wrapping the app are included.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'No backend required', lists 'User authentication' as a non-goal, and prohibits login infrastructure. Including Internet Identity auth client and actor creation directly contradicts these constraints.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend Motoko actor file was added as an empty actor.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request states 'No backend required — this is a purely static frontend portfolio site'. Adding backend/main.mo introduces backend infrastructure not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer includes a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
hallucinated_features.reason: This attribution link was not part of any specified requirement in the build request.

hallucinated_features.description: About section stats row shows '50+ Projects Done' and '100% Client Satisfaction' as specific figures.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies '5+ Years Experience' as a stat. The additional project count and satisfaction percentage are fabricated statistics not present in the provided portfolio structure.

hallucinated_features.description: Hero section includes 'Explore Portfolio' and 'Get In Touch' CTA buttons plus a scroll indicator animation.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 specifies only artist name, subtitle, location, experience badge, tagline, background image, and semi-transparent overlay. CTA buttons and scroll indicators were not requested.
